title: Brentaal Commerce Academy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Brentaal_Commerce_Academy_logo.png|thumb|right|160px|Brentaal Commerce Academy logo]]
The '''Brentaal Commerce Academy''' was an educational institute located on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. It taught business and [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Galactic economy|commerce]].
